text:
Hideout Realtor 隠れ家不動産 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

|align=center colspan="3"|The agent will build a secret room just for you at a place of your choosing. However, you must not tell anyone about it or bring anybody to it.

Summary

Hideout Realtor 隠れ家不動産 - This card allows the caster to summon a Hideout Realtor. The agent you summon will build a secret room in any place of your choosing. This allows the player to hide and remain undetected from unsuspecting people. This card only works on the condition that you don't tell anyone else about it or bring anyone else into it. Otherwise the room becomes inaccessible or the people inside will be sealed off inside.

|No.057 :: 隠れ家不動産 
好きな場所にあなただけの秘密の部屋を作ってくれる。入居条件は誰もその部屋に入れないこと、部屋のことをしゃべらないこと。
|-
![Eng]
|No.057 :: Hideout Realtor 
Can make a secret room just for you wherever you like. The condition that you don't tell anyone about or bring anyone else into the room.
|}
